mechanism_narrative: A rise in the unemployment rate signals a weakening labor market, which tends to produce negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in weak labor markets are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the goods demand proxy signals a weakening economy, which tends to produce negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in weak economies are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rise in the industrial production proxy signals a strengthening supply side, which tends to produce positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in strong supply sides are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rise in the housing market proxy signals a strengthening demand side, which tends to produce positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in strong demand sides are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the employment rate signals a weakening labor market, which tends to produce negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in weak labor markets are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle, which tends to produce positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rise in the goods demand proxy signals a strengthening economy, which tends to produce positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in strong economies are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rise in the industrial production proxy signals a strengthening supply side, which tends to produce positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in strong supply sides are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).
